judgment.summary: The business delivers high growth and strong capital returns despite thin margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 4.58 beat the 4.54 estimate, with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-05-28.
positives: Earnings growth of 45.5% shows significant momentum.
Return on equity of 29.7% indicates strong capital efficiency.
Total cash of $11.13B exceeds total debt of $10.23B.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $6.69B provides substantial liquidity.
negatives: Quick ratio of 0.54 indicates tight short-term liquidity.
Trailing P/E of 54.37 and PEG ratio of 5.29 suggest a very high valuation.
